# Wands
# https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Wands&prop=wikitext

This page includes both custom wands and old wands that have been edited from how they appear on the predicting RotMG server.
{| class="article-table"
!Wands
!Damage
!Range
!RoF
!Shots
!Stats
!Pierce
!Armor Pierce
!Obstacle Pierce
!Fame Bonus
!Tier
!Legendary/Primal Effect
|-
|Wand of Evocation
|105-145
|9.36
|
|
|
|yes
|
|
|5%
|T13
|
|-
|Wand of Retribution
|115-155
|9.36
|
|
|
|yes
|
|
|6%
|T14
|
|-
|Celestial Caduceus
|125-170
|9.36
|
|
|
|yes
|
|
|6%
|GL
|
|-
|Wand of the Rising Star
|70-115
|8
|60%
|3
|
|
|
|
|1%
|Heroic
|
|-
|The Winged Wand
|55-110
|7.01
|95%
|2
|<nowiki>+2att</nowiki>
+4dex
|yes
|
|yes
|5%
|Artifact
|
|-
|Wand Full of Mana
|25-45
|7
|140%
|5
|<nowiki>-75hp</nowiki>
+200mp

-8wis
|
|
|yes
|8%
|Heroic
|
|-
|Radiant Wand of Royalism
|55-75
|8
|150%
|2
|
|yes
|
|
|6%
|Legendary
|Curse
|-
|Realm Power
|150-175
|8.25
|105%
|
|
|yes
|yes
|
|6%
|Legendary
|Last Hope
|-
|Wand of the Bulwark
|350-450
|3
|33%
|
|
|yes
|
|yes
|6%
|Legendary
|Curse
|-
|Conducting Wand
|80-160
|8.01
|125%
|
|<nowiki>+4dex</nowiki>
+4wis
|
|
|
|4%
|Legendary
|Curse
|}
